license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xdwfi7e
title: Urea-mediated dissociation alleviate the false-positive Treponema pallidum-specific antibodies detected by ELISA
author: Qiang Wang

steps_raw.instruction: Collect clinical samples to meet the needs of the experiment, especially false positive samples detected by ELISA.
Using different methods to detect TP antibodies, and to understand the characteristics of different samples, so as to facilitate grouping.
Pre-experiment to explore the basic conditions of urea dissociation.
Formal experiment to select the best condition of urea dissociation.
Sensitivity evaluation of the improved TP-ELISA.
